images/portraits/Andrew Litton.jpg.details: Painted in the studio from a sketch made on the program at the concert. sold in 2026 to (acrylic on board 20"x30")

images/portraits/avi.jpg.details: painting of Avi playing the guitari, circa 2010, as a figure of Avi as a one year-old in Israel in 1964, dressed for Purim as a Sultan. 2'X3', acrylic on board.

images/portraits/martin_hovwerda.jpg.details: Martin was a friend when we lived in Rotterdam.  He was a believer in Extra-terrestrial visitors who came to earth in UFOs, here depitcted behind him.  He's also shown sitting on his home-made wooden briefcase which he carried around with him, as he was convinced secret agents would be searching his apartment.  He used that case to sit on, whenever he had to wait for something like a bus or a train.  painted in the late 1990s.  Acrylic on board. 20"X30".

images/portraits/RachelsIzmir.jpg.title: Rachel's Izmir dream
images/portraits/RachelsIzmir.jpg.details: Missing the Aegean in the Izmir Bay, and the house (now demolished, replaced by an ugly apartment house, on Mithat Pasha Caddesi, while sitting comfortably,on the custom-built couch designed by Bernard, with beautiful gladiolas on the table in the Bernard-designed home in Dallas, Texas.
